name: Farshad Nayeri
throughline: I take vague ideas — about products, organizations, even whole categories — and turn them into things that actually run.

headlines.lens: Builder, director, strategist — same person, four cameras.
headlines.monograph: Forty years of systems work, hand-set in one volume.

availability: Currently available for senior product, platform, and strategy engagements with serious operators in Boston/Cambridge and remote.
